docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NGUYEN, JOHN DBA VIMY ELECTRONICS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT QUINONEZ, LUIS $186.55 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $266.55, DEFENDANT HAS FAILED TO PAY BALANCE OF ACCOUNT OWED FOR A CAMERA.
